title: DMCADesignatedAgent
description: A registered DMCA designated agent for an Online Service Provider (OSP), as recorded in the U.S. Copyright Office DMCA Designated Agent Directory per Section 512 of the Digital Millennium Copyright Act.

registration_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by the Copyright Office to this DMCA agent registration.

service_provider_name.description: Name of the Online Service Provider (OSP) that registered this designated agent.

service_provider_url.description: Website URL of the Online Service Provider.

designated_agent_name.description: Full name of the designated agent authorized to receive DMCA takedown notices.

mailing_address.description: Mailing address for sending DMCA takedown notices to the designated agent.

email.description: Email address for DMCA takedown notice submissions.

registration_date.description: Date this DMCA agent registration was submitted to the Copyright Office.

last_updated.description: Date this registration was last updated.
